creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
Hi,

Would be nice to have bash added to the FreeBSD Installer.

There are several occasions during the installation process where we can switch to a shell for manual operations.
One could like to have bash available to work easier, based on his habits.

The following additional link could also help in some situations :
ln -s /usr/local/bin/bash /bin/bash
(imported script calling /bin/bash etc...)

Thank you very much !

Best regards,

Ben
